gems.title: 真爱留声
gems.summary: 年轻女子给已故姐姐发送的搞笑自白语音留言无意中被转给了陌生人，而这个陌生人竟隔着遥远的距离爱上了她。
gems.summaryEn: A young woman's hilariously confessional voicemails to her late sister are unknowingly redirected to a stranger, who begins to fall in love from afar.
gems.whyWatch: 一部用笑声包裹眼泪的跨时空浪漫，孤独灵魂的意外交响。
gems.whyWatchEn: A cross-temporal romance wrapped in laughter and tears, where two lonely souls find each other through accidental voicemails.
gems.audience: 喜欢《电子情书》式温暖小品、追求情感深度而非俗套的影迷。
gems.audienceEn: Fans of warm, quirky romances like 'You've Got Mail' who crave emotional depth over clichés.

gems.title: 玩具总动员5
gems.summary: 胡迪、巴斯光年、翠斯等“元老级”玩具将跟随小主人邦妮的成长脚步，共同迎接数字时代下的全新挑战。随着无所不能的科技产品逐渐走进童年世界，一批充满科技感的崭新角色也随之重磅亮相：青蛙造型的智能平板小荷、憨态可掬的导航玩具小不丢、活力十足的抓拍好手小拍侠，以及自带笑点的臭屁小机灵。当身边的同龄朋友们开始沉浸在科技玩具带来的“电子陪伴”中，而玩具伙伴们也迎来了前所未有的生存难题：在屏幕占据注意力的时代，玩
gems.summaryEn: When Bonnie receives a Lilypad tablet as a gift and becomes obsessed, Buzz, Woody, Jessie and the rest of the gang's jobs become exponentially harder when they have to go head to head with the all-new
gems.whyWatch: 皮克斯用科技焦虑反讽数字童年，但创意未达巅峰。
gems.whyWatchEn: Pixar cleverly tackles tech anxiety in childhood, though the creative spark isn't quite at its peak.
gems.audience: 《玩具总动员》系列死忠粉，或对当代儿童屏幕依赖话题感兴趣的家长。
gems.audienceEn: Hardcore Toy Story fans, or parents interested in a thoughtful take on children's screen dependency.
